name: Weekly Sell-Through Analysis

data.dsp_query: SELECT sku, category, SUM(units_sold) AS units_sold, AVG(inventory_available) AS avg_inventory, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(units_sold) / NULLIF(SUM(units_sold) + AVG(inventory_available), 0), 1) AS sell_through_pct FROM public.stock_level WHERE date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY sku, category ORDER BY sell_through_pct ASC

semantic.cypher: MATCH (s:Sku)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(c:Category) RETURN s.sku AS sku, c.name AS category, s.target_sell_through AS target LIMIT 50
